name: Coffee with the Cows
blurb: Saturday mornings among the herd, coffee in hand.
longDesc: Start your Saturday slow. Bring a mug (or borrow one of ours) and wander into the pasture while the herd grazes around you. No agenda, no rush — just the animals, the fields, and a quiet farm morning. Kids welcome; closed-toe shoes recommended.

name: Alpaca Experience + Walk
blurb: Meet, groom, and walk our alpacas across the farm.
longDesc: A hands-on hour with the alpacas: learn their names and personalities, help with light grooming, then lead one on a walk around the property. Great for families and first-timers — no experience needed.

name: Private Guided Farm Tour
blurb: A full walkthrough of Tapestry Acres, just for your group.
longDesc: An hour-plus guided tour of the whole farm — pastures, barns, the herd, and the land itself — paced for your group and your questions. Ideal for special occasions or anyone wanting the deep version of the visit.

name: Virtual Farm Tour
blurb: Can't make it out? We'll bring the farm to you, live on video.
longDesc: A live video call tour of the farm from wherever you are — great for classrooms, remote family, or anyone curious about alpaca life before booking an in-person visit.

name: Birthday Party at the Farm
blurb: Celebrate surrounded by alpacas, goats, and open pasture.
longDesc: A farm birthday party package: private pasture time with the herd, photo ops, and space to celebrate outdoors. Contact us to build the day around your group size and age range.

name: Seasonal & One-Time Events
blurb: Shearing day, holiday market, and other farm happenings.
longDesc: Throughout the year we host one-off events — spring shearing day, a holiday market, seasonal open houses. Dates post here and on our socials as they're scheduled; check back or reach out to be notified.
